data.description: Introduce ONE canonical structured-output flag --output VALUE (short -o VALUE), values json|llm|text. Remove legacy --json and --format=* (breaking, pre-1.0). CENTRALIZE parsing in a single sourced bash helper (new ticket-output.sh: _match_output_flag/_validate_output_format) used by every read script (show/list/ready/validate/next-batch/bridge-status), replacing the ~6 duplicated --format=* case arms + bespoke 'unsupported format' strings. argparse choices for ticket-ready.py. Update library (__init__.py next-batch/validate calls), MCP, CLI usage strings, all tests, README/docs. AC: rebar grep shows no rebar-owned --json/--format=* outside acli/jira/git/gh contexts; all three interfaces accept -o/--output; tests green.
data.title: T2: centralize + standardize structured-output flag on --output/-o (drop --json/--format)
